theme_and_archetype.description: A high-visibility, technical, tactical UI. Deep Obsidian anchored with Pure White data points. Built for an advanced Linux user monitoring an NVR-style dashboard in diverse lighting conditions.

mono_data.usage: Timestamps, IP addresses, bitrates, camera IDs

hierarchy.h1: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl uppercase tracking-tighter font-black
hierarchy.h2: text-xl sm:text-2xl uppercase tracking-widest font-bold text-white/80

surfaces_and_materials.strategy: Grid Borders (The Technical Look) combined with Flat Solid surfaces. Avoid Glassmorphism for video grids to maximize performance and clarity.
surfaces_and_materials.camera_card: border border-[#222731] bg-[#12151A] rounded-sm overflow-hidden relative group
surfaces_and_materials.badges: bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 text-xs font-mono uppercase
surfaces_and_materials.ptz_buttons: bg-[#1A1D24] border border-[#222731] hover:bg-[#222731] hover:border-white/30 hover:text-white transition-all active:scale-95 shadow-[inset_0_1px_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.05)] rounded-md

grids_and_layout.philosophy: MODE B: The 'Control Room' Grid. High density, data correlation, scanability.
grids_and_layout.main_layout: h-screen flex flex-col md:flex-row bg-[#0A0C10] overflow-hidden
grids_and_layout.camera_grid: flex-1 grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-2 p-2 auto-rows-max overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar
grids_and_layout.sidebar_right: w-full md:w-80 flex-shrink-0 border-l border-[#222731] bg-[#12151A] flex flex-col
grids_and_layout.spacing: Tight padding within components (p-2, p-4) to maximize screen real estate for video feeds.

elements: Top-left: Camera Name (Chivo) + Status Indicator Dot
Bottom-right: Overlay controls on hover (Fullscreen, PTZ toggle, Settings)

ptz_controller.layout: Grid 3x3 for D-pad (Up, Down, Left, Right, Center Reset). Preset list below.
ptz_controller.styling: Neumorphic tactical keys with sharp 2px borders on active.

recordings_timeline.styling: Dense list with colored left border indicating event type (Motion = Orange, Recording = Blue).

motion.feed_loading: Skeleton with repeating linear gradient scanline effect

background_texture.description: Dark grainy texture for sidebar or login backgrounds.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text must pass WCAG AA over dark backgrounds. Avoid gray-on-gray.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use raw HTML/Tailwind for the dense camera grid layout to maximize control, rather than Shadcn Cards which bring unwanted padding and border radius.
Use Shadcn for Forms, Dialogs (Camera Management), and Tabs (Sidebar switching).
For icons, install and use @phosphor-icons/react or lucide-react with technical/solid variants.
Implement the UI as a single-page full-height dashboard (100vh) without global scrolling. Only the grid and sidebar content should scroll internally.
Use the provided placeholder media URLs to mock the video feeds so the design can be evaluated.
Keep border radius minimal (rounded-sm or rounded-none) to maintain the tactical control room aesthetic.
